ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sentiment_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the sentiment category (e.g., Very favorable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sentiment category */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the category */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the category was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the category */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range represented by the group (e.g., 18-29) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the age group */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the age group was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the age group */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the age group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sentiment category */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of respondents in this sentiment category for the age group */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the sentiment data */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the sentiment data was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the sentiment data */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the sentiment data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_data_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES sentiment_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was conducted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the survey */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the survey */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the survey was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the survey */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the survey was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "respondents" (
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group of the respondent */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the respondent */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the respondent */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the respondent */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the respondent was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the respondent */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the respondent was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response entry */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the respondent */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sentiment category selected by the respondent */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the response */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the response was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the response */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the response was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES sentiment_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the report content */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the report */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was last updated */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey the report is based on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the platform (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the user */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing data */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the access log */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the access log was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the access log */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_logs" (
  "admin_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrative log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the admin log */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the admin log was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the admin log */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the admin log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admin_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the user-role association */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user-role association was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the user-role association */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user-role association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
